title: Pokkunny Siva Temple
tagline: Pokkunny Siva Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Pokkunny Siva Temple (Malayalam: പൊക്കുന്നി ശിവ ക്ഷേത്രം) is an ancient Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Shiva is situated at Vadavannur village of Alathur of Palakkad district in Ke
overview.description: Pokkunny Siva Temple (Malayalam: പൊക്കുന്നി ശിവ ക്ഷേത്രം) is an ancient Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Shiva is situated at Vadavannur village of Alathur of Palakkad district in Kerala state in India. The temple is a part of 108 famous Shiva temples in Kerala. The temple is dedicated to Lord Shiva. Legend has it that Lord Parasurama installed the Shiva Linga at the pond (Perumkulam) in Alathur.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Vadavannur
topPlaces.description: Vadavannur is a village and grama panchayat near to Kollengode Town in the Palakkad District of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Oottara
topPlaces.description: Oottara is a small locality in Vadavannur Panchayat near Kollengode Town in Palakkad District of Kerala State in India. The Kollengode Railway station is located at Oottara.

topPlaces.name: Kollengode, Palakkad
topPlaces.description: Kollengode is a town in Palakkad district, Kerala, India. Kollengode Town is the headquarters of Kollengode Grama Panchayat and Kollengode Block Panchayat.

topPlaces.name: Pallassena
topPlaces.description: Pallassana is a village and gram panchayat in the Palakkad District, state of Kerala, India. It is close to Kollengode Town and Koduvayur and beside the river Gayatri, one of the tributaries of Bharatapuza.

topPlaces.name: Meenkulathi Temple
topPlaces.description: The Meenkulathi Temple is located in Pallassena, a village in southern India.

topPlaces.name: Puthunagaram
topPlaces.description: Puthunagaram is a town and gram panchayat in the Palakkad district, state of Kerala, India. It is about 10 km south of Palakkad and 8 Km from Kollengode.

topPlaces.name: Peruvemba
topPlaces.description: Peruvemba is a village and gram panchayat near Chittur-Thathamangalam in the Palakkad district of Kerala, India. Within the village is the Ootukulangara Bhagavathy Temple.

topPlaces.name: Koduvayur
topPlaces.description: Koduvayur is a Census Town and Grama Panchayat in Palakkad district in the state of Kerala, India. Koduvayur Panchayat comprises Koduvayur-I and Koduvayur-II villages.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Pokkunny Siva Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Pokkunny Siva Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Pokkunny Siva Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Coimbatore International Airport (57 km) and the nearest railway station is Coimbatore Junction (49 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Pokkunny Siva Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Pokkunny Siva Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Pokkunny Siva Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Pokkunny Siva Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Pokkunny Siva Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Vadavannur, Oottara, Kollengode, Palakkad, Pallassena, Meenkulathi Temple.
